instructions.name: stat
instructions.description: L0 instruction: workflow posture stat read face (plugin default; project root required for execution).
instructions.boundPrompt:
[L0 instruction: stat]

Primary skill: workflow-stat.

Discipline: skip L1/L2 Primary selection only — MUST NOT skip context loading.

Read the instruction readFirst entries supplied by the manifest machine fields.

Then run local CLI sw workflow stat --json with --root when available.

instructions.name: hitl
instructions.description: L0 instruction: HITL scan+engage (plugin default; no project root).
instructions.boundPrompt:
[L0 instruction: hitl]

Primary skill: workflow-hitl.

Then run local CLI sw workflow hitl. Execute hitlEngagement immediately.

instructions.name: auto
instructions.description: L0 instruction: auto consumes workflow posture and advances chainPlan (plugin default; project root required for execution).
instructions.boundPrompt:
[L0 instruction: auto]

Primary skill: workflow-auto.

Read every readFirst entry before toolReference. Then run local CLI sw workflow auto with --root when available; advance chainPlan until terminal or honest blocker.
